note: Intended design (otp-cli pattern): tag push -> release.yml -> go test gate -> 4x GOOS/GOARCH go build -> RAW binaries attached to the GitHub Release; README curl one-liners (uname-selected asset) install into ~/bin or /usr/local/bin. No goreleaser/checksums/installer by user decision. As-is baseline (go build only, no CI) in charts/before/.

diagrams.title: Intended: tag -> raw release assets -> README curl one-liner
